message:
chore: Bump version to 0.4.5

Release includes:
- fix: Handle GPT-5.2 role detection and header artifacts
- fix: Validate --outfile and --output-dir arguments and clean up usage
- fix: Respect --quiet flag in Chrome tab restoration messages

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
